# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Get accurate, real-time trading values for every Adopt Me pet. Check mega, neon, and ride variants to ensure fair trades and maximize your collection.

### Platform
https://example.com/platform
Discover our powerful platform built for Adopt Me players. Search any pet, compare variants, and access the most trusted value data in the community.

### Methodology
https://example.com/methodology
Learn the proven methodology behind our accurate pet valuations. We analyze market trends and community trades to deliver reliable Adopt Me values you can trust.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about pet values or need help with the platform? Reach out to our team dedicated to helping Adopt Me players trade smarter and safer.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - conbat

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - conbat

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - conbat

## Legal & Policy

https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.
